title: Angela Mo Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Angela Mo Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Angela Mo
Undergraduate Student
BS in Computer Science ’26
London Campus
After transitioning out of a biology program in Greece, first-year student Angela Mo decided to move to the London campus to take a chance on computer science. The supportive community she’s found there has helped her feel confident that she’ll have a place in the tech industry.
I noticed that everyone in the computer science community, they’re all really inviting and it doesn’t feel like there’s much of a divide between anyone. … I know that I’ll definitely have a place in the industry when I leave college
Angela Mo, BSCS ’26
Explore all Khoury Stories
